specialists.name: Champion Council Fusion
specialists.purpose: Fusion router that retests exact $407k walk-forward highWin routes against Phase17 specialist routes, then selects overlap/high-win/profit-guarded council variants.
specialists.bestFor: Fused specialist council combining high-win and Phase17 routes.
specialists.preferredUse: paper/watchlist specialist until live TradingView alert evidence confirms it
specialists.activation: use when Phase17 and $407k walk-forward specialists overlap or when blended holdout/stress survives
specialists.notes: Fusion router that retests exact $407k walk-forward highWin routes against Phase17 specialist routes, then selects overlap/high-win/profit-guarded council variants.

specialists.name: Profit Max Specialist
specialists.purpose: Aggressive validated satellite fusion mode; much higher modeled profit but lower win rate than main champion.
specialists.bestFor: Higher-profit satellite signals when you accept lower win-rate risk.
specialists.preferredUse: optional aggressive mode / profit-max labels / paper watchlist
specialists.activation: not main default because win rate missed validation floor; usable as separate specialist
specialists.notes: Aggressive validated satellite fusion mode; much higher modeled profit but lower win rate than main champion.

specialists.name: Powerhour Momentum Whitelist Specialist
specialists.purpose: Power-hour long momentum-acceleration route filtered to symbols where the 60d/5m edge held up; profit-style specialist, not main high-win champion.
specialists.bestFor: Late-day momentum scalps on whitelisted symbols.
specialists.preferredUse: specialist overlay / watchlist route; requires forward proof before main promotion
specialists.activation: power hour only, long only, momentum acceleration, whitelist symbols only
specialists.notes: Power-hour long momentum-acceleration route filtered to symbols where the 60d/5m edge held up; profit-style specialist, not main high-win champion.

specialists.name: Phase17 Specialist Router
specialists.purpose: Multi-trigger specialist tournament: train/test/holdout route validation, conflict optimizer, stress slippage, and symbol/session specialists.
specialists.bestFor: Validated multi-trigger routing by symbol, session, and direction.
specialists.preferredUse: watchlist specialist until forward proof confirms it
specialists.activation: router chooses trigger/session/direction specialists by validated route
specialists.forwardFeedback: routes with negative paper/live trust are quarantined or penalized before selection
specialists.notes: Multi-trigger specialist tournament: train/test/holdout route validation, conflict optimizer, stress slippage, and symbol/session specialists.

specialists.name: High Win Main
specialists.purpose: Conservative route champion for safety-first scalp signals.
specialists.bestFor: Default conservative BUY/SELL labels focused on accuracy.
specialists.activation: always available; prioritize when user wants highest modeled accuracy
specialists.notes: Conservative route champion for safety-first scalp signals.
